welcome: How far 👋 Welcome to HerHealth Bot. A safe space to learn, ask questions, and grow with confidence.
learn_menu: Wetin you wan learn about today?
hygiene_menu: Make we talk about how to stay clean.
emotional_menu: Your feelings dey valid. Wetin you need help with?
about_text: HerHealth Bot dey to empower girls with correct information about menstruation. Knowledge na power! 💪
ask_prompt: You fit ask me any question about periods privately. Type your question below:
ask_received: Thank you! Even though I be bot, make I tell you say: Periods na normal thing. If you get pain, tell trusted adult or doctor.
quiz_start: Welcome to Quiz! Make we test your knowledge.
